info.description: Production-ready Go REST API starter with hexagonal architecture.
info.title: Go Starter API

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a JWT token
Refreshes an access token using a valid refresh token

get.description: Returns a paginated list of users
Returns a single user by their ID

delete.description: Deletes a user by their ID

get.description: Returns 200 OK if the server is running
Returns 200 if MongoDB is reachable, 503 otherwise
Returns version, commit, and build time

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and the JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
